title: Cuneiform Tablet #0071: Neo-Babylonian Sale Contract
description: A cuneiform tablet from the Neo-Babylonian period — a sale contract document preserved on clay.
introduction: A cuneiform tablet from the Neo-Babylonian period — a sale contract document preserved on clay.

translation.text: Cuneiform tablet of the Neo-Babylonian period. Sale Contract document. Inscribed on clay in cuneiform script. The tablet records sale contract matters typical of Neo-Babylonian period administrative or literary practice.
